title: Kizaru Lands on Egghead
description: On pages 5–7, this part focuses on Unknown person #3, Kuzan, King Bekori, Unknown person #4, York, Unknown person #5 as The Egghead Incident accelerates as the Marines surround the island, York’s betrayal surfaces, the Straw Hats regroup, Kizaru arrives, and Saturn approaches.
scene: The Egghead Incident accelerates as the Marines surround the island, York’s betrayal surfaces, the Straw Hats regroup, Kizaru arrives, and Saturn approaches.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Grand line

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Bwaaah!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: What the hell is happen- ing?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: unbetweenist to the people...

dialogue.speaker: Kuzan
dialogue.text: No one could determine the epicenter...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: ...so the significance of this geological event...

dialogue.speaker: Kuzan
dialogue.text: ...went unnoticed.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Get to the Hilltop!!

dialogue.speaker: King Bekori
dialogue.text: ...A kingdom known as Luluia...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...was erased from the map only six days prior.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've reached the spot where the kingdom was!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's no trace of it left... just a massive hole...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's like a circular waterfall in the middle of the sea....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: We can't sail any closer...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The ensuing earthquakes caused the global sea level to rise...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But it doesn't look like the hole will collapse in on itself...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: ...by approximately one meter.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Many of the world's shores...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Vat is happening?k?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The tide has never gotten this high before?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: It will recede eventually, won't it?!

dialogue.speaker: York
dialogue.text: ...were lost beneath the waves...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How are we meant to run on the beach now?!()

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: And some islands were submerged entirely...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: EVERY- thing's flooded...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: We can't stay here!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: There's a shark in my house!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Woof Wool!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Reports of flooded islands are still coming in...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: It shouldn't be high tide yet!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm sure to get a big catch on a day like this!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You NUMBSKULL!! Going fishing now would be suicide!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: NEW WORLD - EGGHEAD, THE ISLAND OF THE FUTURE...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Sea levels have risen world- wide?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Yes, sir... we're at a loss...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: A massive force has surrounded the island...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...possessing more than enough firepower to put a buster call to shame!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The fleet is comprised of over one hundred ships of various size and class.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: WAAH!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: It's a Mecha- Monster!

dialogue.speaker: York
dialogue.text: There are 20 great warships among them...

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: ...and a total of 30,000 Marines!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: GYooo AAY!!!

summary: This part advances the Egghead Siege Begins through 43 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
